title: GPU reduce_min / reduce_max kernels
description:
Add native PTX reduce_min and reduce_max kernels to ferrotorch-gpu, mirroring gpu_reduce_sum. Currently masked_min/max GPU paths fall back to host download + CPU reduce (#616), which is correct but burns PCIe bandwidth proportional to numel. A two-pass min/max parallel reduction kernel (analogous to reduce_sum_kernel) lets the result stay on-device.

Also enables: torch.amin/amax/min/max GPU forwards, top-k pruning, etc.
